automation.title: Perception Triggers
automation.subtitle: Trigger a proactive camera perception on Xiaomi device property change or event, with optional property/value filters.
automation.configDesc: Configure which cameras to trigger for each Xiaomi event source. Once created, perception runs automatically on trigger conditions.
automation.sourceKindPropHint: Triggers when a property reaches the specified value
automation.sourceKindEventHint: Triggers on click, proximity, alarm, etc.
automation.noEventDef: No event definitions loaded yet. Available events and trigger params will be shown here per device MIoT Spec.
automation.noPropDef: No property definitions loaded yet. Available properties and values will be shown here per device MIoT Spec.
automation.noParamDef: This event has no configurable params; it triggers whenever the event occurs.
automation.perceptionHintDesc: A default prompt appended to the triggered perception, telling the model what to focus on.
automation.perceptionPlaceholder: e.g. focus on whether someone is by the window, doors/windows open, any abnormal activity
automation.cooldownDesc: After a trigger hits, repeats within this period are ignored to avoid frequent perception.
automation.hintSelectCamera: Please select at least one related camera
automation.hintSelectEvent: Please select a device event to listen for
automation.hintReady: Click save when done; perception triggers on matching conditions
automation.existingDesc: {{count}} config(s). Matching configs trigger corresponding camera perception.
